title: Berries and Cherries Delight
description: B&C Adds a bunch of new berry and fruit bushes/trees to the world
body:
Berries and Cherries

 

Berries and Cherries adds a bunch of berries to the game. At the minute it adds strawberries, blueberries, green grapes, dark grapes, cherries and raspberries. At the minute they only offer nutritional benefits but I plan on adding more functionality to the mod to create different recipes.

 

Features

The bushes and their respective saplings act fully like vanilla bushes/saplings meaning:

Saplings grow over time
Bonemeal makes them grow faster
Taking the berries from the bushes with your bare hands will causing damage from the thorns
Using shears prevents the damage
Each bush drops only 1 berry currently (I plan on changing this making it a random amount)
Once the bushes/leaves have been depleted of their fruit they will eventually re grow the fruit/berries
 

Blocks/Items

Iron Bowl - A heat resitant bowl to cook berry mixes into jelled mixes
Jam Jar - Container for filling with jam
Iron Knife - Cuts up berrys into chunks
Berry Crusher - Used to obtain berry juices required for jam recipes
 

Planned Features

Berry Juices
Jams
Additional recipes and food items
Config files
Some more IRL and fantasy berries/fruits
More fruit trees
